<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,maximum-scale=1,user-scalable=no">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<title>Fulton & Main</title>
<style>
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;}
html,body{height:100%;overflow:hidden;background:#060D1A;font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',monospace;color:#F8FAFC;}

/* ── APP SHELL ── */
#app{display:flex;flex-direction:column;height:100%;}
.topbar{background:#0A1628;border-bottom:1px solid #1E293B;padding:10px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0;}
.topbar img{height:26px;object-fit:contain;}
.topbar .nj{max-width:34px;filter:invert(1);}
.topbar .adoni{max-width:100px;}
.topbar-mid{text-align:center;}
.topbar-mid h1{font-size:12px;font-weight:900;color:#F8FAFC;}
.topbar-mid p{font-size:7px;color:#334155;letter-spacing:2px;}
.fbar{height:3px;display:flex;flex-shrink:0;}
.fbar span{flex:1;}

/* ── BOTTOM NAV ── */
.bottom-nav{display:flex;background:#0A1628;border-top:1px solid #1E293B;flex-shrink:0;}
.bnav-btn{flex:1;padding:10px 4px 12px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:3px;border:none;background:none;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;}
.bnav-btn .icon{font-size:20px;}
.bnav-btn .lbl{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#475569;letter-spacing:0.5px;}
.bnav-btn.active .lbl{color:#F8FAFC;}
.bnav-indicator{height:3px;border-radius:2px;width:24px;margin-top:2px;}

/* ── SCREENS ── */
.screen{display:none;flex:1;overflow-y:auto;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;}
.screen.active{display:flex;flex-direction:column;}

/* ── HOME SCREEN ── */
.home-pad{padding:14px;}
.stats-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:6px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.stat-card{background:#0F172A;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 4px;text-align:center;}
.stat-card .sv{font-weight:900;font-size:18px;}
.stat-card .sl{font-size:6px;letter-spacing:1px;color:#334155;margin-top:1px;}
.section-title{color:#475569;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.unit-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;}
.ucard{background:#0F172A;border-radius:12px;padding:12px;cursor:pointer;border:2px solid;position:relative;overflow:hidden;active:opacity:0.7;}
.ucard .tc{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:4px;}
.ucard-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.ubadge{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:9px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:900;font-size:14px;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0;}
.uname{font-weight:800;font-size:11px;color:#F8FAFC;}
.ufloor{color:#475569;font-size:8px;margin-top:1px;}
.uside{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;margin-top:1px;}
.upct{font-weight:900;font-size:14px;margin-left:auto;}
.upbar{height:3px;background:#1E293B;border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:6px;}
.upfill{height:100%;border-radius:2px;}
.umatrow{display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.umat{border-radius:4px;padding:2px 5px;font-size:7px;font-weight:700;border:1px solid #334155;background:#1E293B;color:#475569;}
.umat.done{border-color:#16A34A;background:#001A00;color:#16A34A;}
.filters-wrap{display:flex;gap:5px;overflow-x:auto;margin-bottom:8px;padding-bottom:2px;}
.filters-wrap::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none;}
.fpill{padding:5px 11px;border-radius:20px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap;color:#475569;background:#0F172A;border:none;cursor:pointer;}
.fpill.active{color:#fff;}
.sfilter{display:flex;gap:5px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.spill{flex:1;padding:7px;border-radius:8px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#475569;background:#0F172A;border:none;cursor:pointer;}
.search-box{width:100%;padding:9px 14px;border-radius:9px;border:1px solid #1E293B;background:#0F172A;color:#F8FAFC;font-size:14px;outline:none;margin-bottom:10px;-webkit-appearance:none;}

/* ── MAP SCREEN ── */
.map-pad{padding:14px;}
.floor-tabs{display:flex;gap:5px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.ftab{flex:1;padding:8px 2px;border-radius:8px;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;color:#475569;background:#0F172A;}
.ftab.active{color:#fff;}
.wing-lbl{color:#475569;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:6px;margin-top:10px;}
.map-container{position:relative;width:100%;border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;border:2px solid;margin-bottom:4px;}
.map-container img{width:100%;display:block;}
.umarker{position:absolute;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);cursor:pointer;z-index:5;}
.mdot{width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.85);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:900;font-size:7px;color:#fff;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);}
.mlbl{background:rgba(0,0,0,0.75);border-radius:3px;padding:1px 3px;font-size:6px;color:#fff;font-weight:700;margin-top:1px;white-space:nowrap;text-align:center;}
.zoom-hint{color:#334155;font-size:8px;text-align:center;margin-bottom:8px;letter-spacing:1px;}

/* ── UNIT DETAIL SHEET ── */
.sheet-overlay{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.65);z-index:200;}
.sheet-overlay.active{display:block;}
.sheet{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:201;background:#0F172A;border-radius:20px 20px 0 0;border-top:3px solid;max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;transform:translateY(100%);transition:transform 0.3s ease;}
.sheet.open{transform:translateY(0);}
.sheet-handle{width:40px;height:4px;background:#334155;border-radius:2px;margin:12px auto 0;}
.sheet-inner{padding:16px;}
.sheet-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.sheet-badge{width:54px;height:54px;border-radius:13px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:900;font-size:21px;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0;}
.sheet-unit{font-weight:900;font-size:19px;color:#F8FAFC;}
.sheet-sub{font-size:11px;margin-top:3px;}
.side-pill{display:inline-block;margin-top:5px;border-radius:6px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:2px;border:1.5px solid;}

/* Box editor */
.editor-card{background:#1E293B;border-radius:12px;padding:13px;margin-bottom:12px;}
.editor-title{color:#64748B;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.ed-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:9px;}
.ed-item{background:#0F172A;border-radius:10px;padding:11px;}
.ed-room{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#F8FAFC;margin-bottom:2px;}
.ed-sub{color:#64748B;font-size:8px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.ed-counter{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;justify-content:center;}
.ed-btn{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:8px;border:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:900;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.ed-minus{background:#172554;color:#60A5FA;}
.ed-plus{background:#14532D;color:#4ADE80;}
.ed-val{font-size:22px;font-weight:900;color:#F8FAFC;min-width:30px;text-align:center;}
.ed-confirm{width:100%;padding:13px;border-radius:11px;border:none;font-size:13px;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;margin-top:10px;font-family:monospace;}

/* Status section */
.status-section{margin-bottom:12px;}
.status-group{background:#1E293B;border-radius:12px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.sg-header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:8px;}
.sg-mat{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#F8FAFC;}
.sg-count{font-size:9px;color:#64748B;}
.status-btns{display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.sbtn{padding:6px 9px;border-radius:7px;font-size:9px;font-weight:800;border:1.5px solid;cursor:pointer;}

.sheet-close{width:100%;padding:13px;background:#1E293B;border:none;border-radius:11px;color:#64748B;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;margin-top:4px;font-family:monospace;}

/* box label preview */
.label-preview{background:#fff;border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;border:3px solid;margin-bottom:8px;}
.lp-top{padding:7px 12px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;}
.lp-room{color:#fff;font-weight:900;font-size:13px;}
.lp-unit{background:rgba(0,0,0,0.25);border-radius:6px;padding:4px 8px;color:#fff;font-weight:900;font-size:16px;text-align:center;}
.lp-body{padding:10px 12px;background:#fff;}
.lp-code{background:#F1F5F9;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;text-align:center;color:#0F172A;font-weight:900;font-size:10px;word-break:break-all;margin-bottom:8px;}
.lp-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:5px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.lp-cell{background:#F8FAFC;border-radius:5px;padding:5px 6px;}
.lp-cl{color:#94A3B8;font-size:6px;letter-spacing:1px;}
.lp-cv{font-weight:900;font-size:13px;color:#0F172A;}
.lp-warn{color:#94A3B8;font-size:7px;text-align:right;line-height:1.4;}
.lp-foot{height:5px;}
.sc-color{height:5px;border-radius:0 0 8px 8px;}

/* ── FOOTER ── */
.screen-footer{text-align:center;padding:16px 0 4px;color:#1E293B;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:2px;}
</style>

</head>
<body>
<div id="app">

  <!-- TOP BAR -->

  <div class="topbar">
    <img class="adoni" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Adoni">
    <div class="topbar-mid"><h1>Fulton &amp; Main</h1><p>BOX TRACKING · WOODBRIDGE NJ</p></div>
    <img class="nj" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="NJ">
  </div>
  <div class="fbar">
    <span style="background:#2563EB"></span><span style="background:#16A34A"></span>
    <span style="background:#D97706"></span><span style="background:#DC2626"></span>
  </div>

  <!-- SCREEN: HOME (list) -->

  <div class="screen active" id="screen-home">
    <div class="home-pad">
      <div class="stats-row" id="stats-bar"></div>
      <div class="filters-wrap" id="floor-filters"></div>
      <div class="sfilter">
        <button class="spill active" data-side="all" onclick="setSide(this,'all')">All</button>
        <button class="spill" data-side="NORTH" onclick="setSide(this,'NORTH')" style="color:#38BDF8">↑ North</button>
        <button class="spill" data-side="SOUTH" onclick="setSide(this,'SOUTH')" style="color:#FB923C">↓ South</button>
      </div>
      <input class="search-box" type="search" placeholder="🔍  Search unit..." oninput="setSearch(this.value)">
      <div class="section-title" id="count-lbl"></div>
      <div class="unit-grid" id="unit-grid"></div>
      <div class="screen-footer">ADONI PROPERTY GROUP · WOODWORK NJ</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- SCREEN: MAP -->

  <div class="screen" id="screen-map">
    <div class="map-pad">
      <div class="floor-tabs">
        <button class="ftab active" onclick="showFloor('2',this)" style="background:#2563EB;color:#fff">FL 2</button>
        <button class="ftab" onclick="showFloor('3',this)">FL 3</button>
        <button class="ftab" onclick="showFloor('4',this)">FL 4</button>
        <button class="ftab" onclick="showFloor('5',this)">FL 5</button>
      </div>
      <div class="zoom-hint">📍 Toque numa unidade · Pinch to zoom</div>

```
  <div id="map-sec-2">
    <div class="map-container" style="border-color:#2563EB" id="mc-fl2">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Floor 2" loading="lazy">
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="map-sec-3" style="display:none">
    <div class="wing-lbl">◀ LEFT WING — 301–330</div>
    <div class="map-container" style="border-color:#16A34A" id="mc-fl3_left">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Floor 3L" loading="lazy">
    </div>
    <div class="wing-lbl">▶ RIGHT WING — 310–324</div>
    <div class="map-container" style="border-color:#16A34A" id="mc-fl3_right">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Floor 3R" loading="lazy">
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="map-sec-4" style="display:none">
    <div class="wing-lbl">◀ LEFT WING — 401–430</div>
    <div class="map-container" style="border-color:#D97706" id="mc-fl4_left">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Floor 4L" loading="lazy">
    </div>
    <div class="wing-lbl">▶ RIGHT WING — 410–424</div>
    <div class="map-container" style="border-color:#D97706" id="mc-fl4_right">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Floor 4R" loading="lazy">
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="map-sec-5" style="display:none">
    <div class="wing-lbl">◀ LEFT WING — 504–512</div>
    <div class="map-container" style="border-color:#DC2626" id="mc-fl5_left">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Floor 5L" loading="lazy">
    </div>
    <div class="wing-lbl">▶ RIGHT WING — 501–524</div>
    <div class="map-container" style="border-color:#DC2626" id="mc-fl5_right">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Floor 5R" loading="lazy">
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="screen-footer">ADONI PROPERTY GROUP · WOODWORK NJ</div>
</div>
```

  </div>

  <!-- BOTTOM NAV -->

  <div class="bottom-nav">
    <button class="bnav-btn active" id="nav-home" onclick="switchScreen('home')">
      <span class="icon">🏠</span>
      <span class="lbl">UNITS</span>
      <div class="bnav-indicator" id="ind-home" style="background:#6366F1"></div>
    </button>
    <button class="bnav-btn" id="nav-map" onclick="switchScreen('map')">
      <span class="icon">🗺️</span>
      <span class="lbl">MAP</span>
      <div class="bnav-indicator" id="ind-map" style="background:transparent"></div>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- UNIT DETAIL SHEET -->

<div class="sheet-overlay" id="sheet-overlay" onclick="closeSheet()"></div>
<div class="sheet" id="unit-sheet">
  <div class="sheet-handle"></div>
  <div class="sheet-inner" id="sheet-body"></div>
</div>

<script>
// ── DATA ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const FL_COLORS = {2:"#2563EB",3:"#16A34A",4:"#D97706",5:"#DC2626"};
const FL_LABELS = {2:"2nd Floor",3:"3rd Floor",4:"4th Floor",5:"5th Floor"};
const MATS = {
  KC:{room:"KITCHEN",    icon:"🍳",parts:["BASE CABINET","UPPER CABINET","TALL PANTRY","DOOR","DRAWER FRONT","SHELF","FILLER"]},
  VN:{room:"MASTER BATH",icon:"🪞",parts:["VANITY BASE","VANITY DOOR","DRAWER FRONT","SIDE PANEL","SHELF"]},
  CL:{room:"CLOSET",     icon:"👔",parts:["UPPER SECTION","LOWER SECTION","DOOR PANEL","SHELF","HANGING ROD"]},
  CT:{room:"COUNTER TOP",icon:"◼",parts:["MAIN SLAB","LEFT SIDE","RIGHT SIDE","BACKSPLASH"]},
};
const STATUS_LIST = ["ORDERED","SHIPPED","AT PORT","RECEIVED","INSTALLED"];
const SC = {ORDERED:"#64748B",SHIPPED:"#F59E0B","AT PORT":"#0EA5E9",RECEIVED:"#16A34A",INSTALLED:"#22D3EE"};
const SB = {ORDERED:"#1E293B",SHIPPED:"#1A1000","AT PORT":"#001929",RECEIVED:"#001A00",INSTALLED:"#001A1F"};
const TYPE_LABELS = {M1A:"1BR",M1B:"1BR+",M2A:"2BR",M2B:"2BR+",M2C:"2BR+",M3A:"3BR",M3B:"3BR",M3C:"3BR",M3D:"3BR",M3E:"3BR",C2:"Corner",C3:"Corner+"};
const UNIT_DATA_RAW = {"202": {"floor": 2, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "203": {"floor": 2, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "204": {"floor": 2, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "205": {"floor": 2, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "206": {"floor": 2, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "207": {"floor": 2, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "208": {"floor": 2, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "209": {"floor": 2, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "201": {"floor": 2, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M3A", "boxes": {"KC": 4, "VN": 3, "CL": 3, "CT": 1}}, "213": {"floor": 2, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M2B", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 3, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "214": {"floor": 2, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M1B", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "215": {"floor": 2, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "216": {"floor": 2, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "217": {"floor": 2, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "218": {"floor": 2, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "C2", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "219": {"floor": 2, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M3A", "boxes": {"KC": 4, "VN": 3, "CL": 3, "CT": 1}}, "302": {"floor": 3, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M3B", "boxes": {"KC": 4, "VN": 3, "CL": 3, "CT": 1}}, "303": {"floor": 3, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "304": {"floor": 3, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "305": {"floor": 3, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "306": {"floor": 3, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "307": {"floor": 3, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "308": {"floor": 3, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "309": {"floor": 3, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "301": {"floor": 3, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M3A", "boxes": {"KC": 4, "VN": 3, "CL": 3, "CT": 1}}, "325": {"floor": 3, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M2B", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 3, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "326": {"floor": 3, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "C2", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "327": {"floor": 3, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M2C", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 3, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "328": {"floor": 3, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M1B", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "329": {"floor": 3, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "330": {"floor": 3, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "C2", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "310": {"floor": 3, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "311": {"floor": 3, "side": "NORTH", "type": "C3", "boxes": {"KC": 4, "VN": 3, "CL": 3, "CT": 1}}, "312": {"floor": 3, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "313": {"floor": 3, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "314": {"floor": 3, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "315": {"floor": 3, "side": "NORTH", "type": "C3", "boxes": {"KC": 4, "VN": 3, "CL": 3, "CT": 1}}, "316": {"floor": 3, "side": "NORTH", "type": "C2", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "317": {"floor": 3, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M3C", "boxes": {"KC": 4, "VN": 3, "CL": 3, "CT": 1}}, "318": {"floor": 3, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M3D", "boxes": {"KC": 4, "VN": 3, "CL": 3, "CT": 1}}, "319": {"floor": 3, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "C2", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "320": {"floor": 3, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "321": {"floor": 3, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "322": {"floor": 3, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "323": {"floor": 3, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "324": {"floor": 3, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M3E", "boxes": {"KC": 4, "VN": 3, "CL": 3, "CT": 1}}, "402": {"floor": 4, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M3B", "boxes": {"KC": 4, "VN": 3, "CL": 3, "CT": 1}}, "403": {"floor": 4, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "404": {"floor": 4, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "405": {"floor": 4, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "406": {"floor": 4, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "407": {"floor": 4, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "408": {"floor": 4, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "409": {"floor": 4, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "401": {"floor": 4, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M3A", "boxes": {"KC": 4, "VN": 3, "CL": 3, "CT": 1}}, "425": {"floor": 4, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M2B", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 3, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "426": {"floor": 4, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "C2", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "427": {"floor": 4, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M2C", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 3, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "428": {"floor": 4, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M1B", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "429": {"floor": 4, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "430": {"floor": 4, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "C2", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "410": {"floor": 4, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "411": {"floor": 4, "side": "NORTH", "type": "C3", "boxes": {"KC": 4, "VN": 3, "CL": 3, "CT": 1}}, "412": {"floor": 4, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "413": {"floor": 4, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "414": {"floor": 4, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "415": {"floor": 4, "side": "NORTH", "type": "C3", "boxes": {"KC": 4, "VN": 3, "CL": 3, "CT": 1}}, "416": {"floor": 4, "side": "NORTH", "type": "C2", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "417": {"floor": 4, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M3C", "boxes": {"KC": 4, "VN": 3, "CL": 3, "CT": 1}}, "418": {"floor": 4, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M3D", "boxes": {"KC": 4, "VN": 3, "CL": 3, "CT": 1}}, "419": {"floor": 4, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "C2", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "420": {"floor": 4, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "421": {"floor": 4, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "422": {"floor": 4, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "423": {"floor": 4, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "424": {"floor": 4, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M3E", "boxes": {"KC": 4, "VN": 3, "CL": 3, "CT": 1}}, "504": {"floor": 5, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "505": {"floor": 5, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "506": {"floor": 5, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "507": {"floor": 5, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "508": {"floor": 5, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M1A", "boxes": {"KC": 2, "VN": 2, "CL": 1, "CT": 1}}, "509": {"floor": 5, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "510": {"floor": 5, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "511": {"floor": 5, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M3C", "boxes": {"KC": 4, "VN": 3, "CL": 3, "CT": 1}}, "512": {"floor": 5, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "C2", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "501": {"floor": 5, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "502": {"floor": 5, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "503": {"floor": 5, "side": "NORTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "513": {"floor": 5, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "515": {"floor": 5, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "517": {"floor": 5, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "518": {"floor": 5, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "519": {"floor": 5, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "521": {"floor": 5, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "522": {"floor": 5, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "523": {"floor": 5, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M2A", "boxes": {"KC": 3, "VN": 2, "CL": 2, "CT": 1}}, "524": {"floor": 5, "side": "SOUTH", "type": "M3E", "boxes": {"KC": 4, "VN": 3, "CL": 3, "CT": 1}}};
const MARKERS      = {"202": [12, 30], "203": [20, 25], "204": [27, 25], "205": [34, 25], "206": [41, 25], "207": [48, 25], "208": [60, 25], "209": [68, 25], "201": [7, 72], "213": [14, 72], "214": [28, 72], "215": [35, 72], "216": [42, 72], "217": [49, 72], "218": [62, 72], "219": [76, 72], "302": [8, 28], "303": [17, 22], "304": [25, 22], "305": [32, 22], "306": [39, 22], "307": [46, 22], "308": [56, 22], "309": [64, 22], "301": [7, 72], "330": [17, 72], "329": [26, 72], "328": [36, 72], "327": [43, 72], "326": [58, 72], "325": [68, 72], "310": [6, 22], "311": [13, 22], "312": [22, 22], "313": [30, 22], "314": [38, 22], "315": [47, 22], "316": [56, 22], "317": [68, 22], "324": [6, 68], "323": [14, 68], "322": [22, 68], "321": [30, 68], "320": [38, 68], "319": [52, 68], "318": [64, 68], "402": [8, 28], "403": [17, 22], "404": [25, 22], "405": [32, 22], "406": [39, 22], "407": [46, 22], "408": [56, 22], "409": [64, 22], "401": [7, 72], "430": [17, 72], "429": [26, 72], "428": [36, 72], "427": [43, 72], "426": [58, 72], "425": [68, 72], "410": [6, 22], "411": [13, 22], "412": [22, 22], "413": [30, 22], "414": [38, 22], "415": [47, 22], "416": [56, 22], "417": [68, 22], "424": [6, 68], "423": [14, 68], "422": [22, 68], "421": [30, 68], "420": [38, 68], "419": [52, 68], "418": [64, 68], "511": [8, 30], "510": [18, 25], "509": [27, 25], "508": [36, 25], "507": [44, 25], "506": [52, 25], "505": [62, 25], "504": [71, 25], "512": [55, 72], "503": [6, 30], "502": [15, 25], "501": [25, 25], "513": [6, 55], "515": [15, 55], "517": [25, 55], "518": [35, 55], "519": [45, 55], "521": [55, 55], "522": [63, 55], "523": [72, 55], "524": [82, 55]};
const UNIT_IMG     = {"202": "fl2", "203": "fl2", "204": "fl2", "205": "fl2", "206": "fl2", "207": "fl2", "208": "fl2", "209": "fl2", "201": "fl2", "213": "fl2", "214": "fl2", "215": "fl2", "216": "fl2", "217": "fl2", "218": "fl2", "219": "fl2", "302": "fl3_left", "303": "fl3_left", "304": "fl3_left", "305": "fl3_left", "306": "fl3_left", "307": "fl3_left", "308": "fl3_left", "309": "fl3_left", "301": "fl3_left", "330": "fl3_left", "329": "fl3_left", "328": "fl3_left", "327": "fl3_left", "326": "fl3_left", "325": "fl3_left", "310": "fl3_right", "311": "fl3_right", "312": "fl3_right", "313": "fl3_right", "314": "fl3_right", "315": "fl3_right", "316": "fl3_right", "317": "fl3_right", "324": "fl3_right", "323": "fl3_right", "322": "fl3_right", "321": "fl3_right", "320": "fl3_right", "319": "fl3_right", "318": "fl3_right", "402": "fl4_left", "403": "fl4_left", "404": "fl4_left", "405": "fl4_left", "406": "fl4_left", "407": "fl4_left", "408": "fl4_left", "409": "fl4_left", "401": "fl4_left", "430": "fl4_left", "429": "fl4_left", "428": "fl4_left", "427": "fl4_left", "426": "fl4_left", "425": "fl4_left", "410": "fl4_right", "411": "fl4_right", "412": "fl4_right", "413": "fl4_right", "414": "fl4_right", "415": "fl4_right", "416": "fl4_right", "417": "fl4_right", "424": "fl4_right", "423": "fl4_right", "422": "fl4_right", "421": "fl4_right", "420": "fl4_right", "419": "fl4_right", "418": "fl4_right", "511": "fl5_left", "510": "fl5_left", "509": "fl5_left", "508": "fl5_left", "507": "fl5_left", "506": "fl5_left", "505": "fl5_left", "504": "fl5_left", "512": "fl5_left", "503": "fl5_right", "502": "fl5_right", "501": "fl5_right", "513": "fl5_right", "515": "fl5_right", "517": "fl5_right", "518": "fl5_right", "519": "fl5_right", "521": "fl5_right", "522": "fl5_right", "523": "fl5_right", "524": "fl5_right"};

// Build state
let state = {};
let filterFloor="all", filterSide="all", search="";
let markersBuilt = {};

function buildData(){
  Object.entries(UNIT_DATA_RAW).forEach(([unit,info])=>{
    const boxes=[];
    Object.entries(MATS).forEach(([mat])=>{
      const total = info.boxes[mat]||0;
      for(let b=1;b<=total;b++) boxes.push({
        id:`FM-FL${info.floor}-${unit}-${info.side[0]}-${mat}-BOX${b}of${total}`,
        mat,boxNum:b,totalBoxes:total,status:"ORDERED"
      });
    });
    state[unit]={floor:info.floor,side:info.side,type:info.type,
      boxCounts:{...info.boxes},boxes,status:{} };
  });
}
buildData();

function fc(f){return FL_COLORS[f]??"#6B7280";}

// ── NAV ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function switchScreen(name){
  document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('screen-'+name).classList.add('active');
  document.querySelectorAll('.bnav-btn').forEach(b=>{b.classList.remove('active');b.querySelector('.bnav-indicator').style.background='transparent';});
  document.getElementById('nav-'+name).classList.add('active');
  const colors={home:'#6366F1',map:'#0EA5E9'};
  document.getElementById('ind-'+name).style.background = colors[name]||'#6366F1';
  if(name==='map') buildCurrentFloorMarkers();
}

// ── STATS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function updateStats(){
  const all=Object.values(state).flatMap(d=>d.boxes);
  document.getElementById('stats-bar').innerHTML=[
    ["Units",Object.keys(state).length,"#6366F1"],
    ["Boxes",all.length,"#0EA5E9"],
    ["Received",all.filter(b=>b.status==="RECEIVED"||b.status==="INSTALLED").length,"#16A34A"],
    ["Done",all.filter(b=>b.status==="INSTALLED").length,"#22D3EE"],
  ].map(([l,v,c])=>`<div class="stat-card" style="border:1px solid ${c}44"><div class="sv" style="color:${c}">${v}</div><div class="sl">${l}</div></div>`).join('');
}

// ── GRID ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function renderFloorFilters(){
  const btns=[`<button class="fpill active" onclick="setFloor(this,'all')" style="background:#6366F1;color:#fff">All</button>`];
  Object.entries(FL_LABELS).forEach(([n,l])=>btns.push(`<button class="fpill" data-floor="${n}" onclick="setFloor(this,'${n}')">${l}</button>`));
  document.getElementById('floor-filters').innerHTML=btns.join('');
}

function renderGrid(){
  const units=Object.entries(state).filter(([u,d])=>{
    if(filterFloor!=="all"&&d.floor!==parseInt(filterFloor))return false;
    if(filterSide!=="all"&&d.side!==filterSide)return false;
    if(search&&!u.includes(search))return false;
    return true;
  });
  document.getElementById('count-lbl').textContent=units.length+" UNITS";
  document.getElementById('unit-grid').innerHTML=units.map(([unit,d])=>{
    const color=fc(d.floor),total=d.boxes.length;
    const done=d.boxes.filter(b=>b.status==="RECEIVED"||b.status==="INSTALLED").length;
    const pct=Math.round(total>0?(done/total)*100:0);
    const sclr=d.side==="NORTH"?"#38BDF8":"#FB923C";
    const mb=Object.keys(MATS).map(mat=>{
      const mc=d.boxCounts[mat]||0;
      const md=d.boxes.filter(b=>b.mat===mat&&(b.status==="RECEIVED"||b.status==="INSTALLED")).length;
      return `<span class="umat ${md===mc&&mc>0?'done':''}">${MATS[mat].icon}${mat} ${mc}</span>`;
    }).join('');
    return `<div class="ucard" style="border-color:${color}" onclick="openSheet('${unit}')">
      <div class="tc" style="background:${color}"></div>
      <div class="ucard-head">
        <div class="ubadge" style="background:${color};box-shadow:0 2px 10px ${color}55">${unit}</div>
        <div style="flex:1">
          <div class="uname">Unit ${unit}</div>
          <div class="ufloor">${FL_LABELS[d.floor]}</div>
          <div class="uside" style="color:${sclr}">${d.side==="NORTH"?"↑N":"↓S"} · ${TYPE_LABELS[d.type]||d.type}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="upct" style="color:${color}">${pct}%</div>
      </div>
      <div class="upbar"><div class="upfill" style="width:${pct}%;background:${color}"></div></div>
      <div class="umatrow">${mb}</div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

// ── FILTERS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function setFloor(btn,val){
  filterFloor=val;
  document.querySelectorAll('.fpill').forEach(b=>{b.style.background="#0F172A";b.style.color="#475569";});
  const color=val==="all"?"#6366F1":FL_COLORS[parseInt(val)];
  btn.style.background=color;btn.style.color="#fff";renderGrid();
}
function setSide(btn,val){
  filterSide=val;
  document.querySelectorAll('.spill').forEach(b=>{b.style.background="#0F172A";b.style.color=b.dataset.side==="NORTH"?"#38BDF8":b.dataset.side==="SOUTH"?"#FB923C":"#475569";});
  btn.style.background=val==="all"?"#6366F1":val==="NORTH"?"#0369A1":"#C2410C";btn.style.color="#fff";renderGrid();
}
function setSearch(v){search=v;renderGrid();}

// ── SHEET ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function openSheet(unit){
  const d=state[unit];
  const color=fc(d.floor);
  const sclr=d.side==="NORTH"?"#38BDF8":"#FB923C";
  const sbg=d.side==="NORTH"?"#0C2A40":"#2A1500";
  const sbdr=d.side==="NORTH"?"#38BDF8":"#FB923C";
  const totalBoxes=Object.values(d.boxCounts).reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0);

  // Build box editor
  const edItems=Object.entries(MATS).map(([mat,m])=>`
    <div class="ed-item">
      <div class="ed-room">${m.icon} ${m.room}</div>
      <div class="ed-sub">${mat}</div>
      <div class="ed-counter">
        <button class="ed-btn ed-minus" onclick="adjustBox('${unit}','${mat}',-1)">−</button>
        <div class="ed-val" id="bc-${unit}-${mat}">${d.boxCounts[mat]||0}</div>
        <button class="ed-btn ed-plus" onclick="adjustBox('${unit}','${mat}',1)">+</button>
      </div>
    </div>`).join('');

  // Build status sections per material
  const statusSections=Object.entries(MATS).map(([mat,m])=>{
    const matBoxes=d.boxes.filter(b=>b.mat===mat);
    if(matBoxes.length===0)return'';
    const btns=STATUS_LIST.map(s=>`
      <button class="sbtn" id="gsb-${unit}-${mat}-${s.replace(' ','')}"
        style="background:${SB[s]};border-color:${SC[s]};color:${SC[s]}"
        onclick="setGroupStatus('${unit}','${mat}','${s}')">
        ${s}
      </button>`).join('');
    const allSame=matBoxes.every(b=>b.status===matBoxes[0].status)?matBoxes[0].status:'';
    return `<div class="status-group">
      <div class="sg-header">
        <div class="sg-mat">${m.icon} ${m.room}</div>
        <div class="sg-count">${matBoxes.length} boxes · ${d.boxCounts[mat]}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="status-btns">${btns}</div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');

  // Label preview for KC box 1
  const kcBox=d.boxes.find(b=>b.mat==="KC");
  const labelPreview=kcBox?`
    <div style="color:#475569;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:8px">LABEL PREVIEW · KITCHEN BOX 1</div>
    <div class="label-preview" style="border-color:${color}">
      <div class="lp-top" style="background:${color}">
        <div>
          <div class="lp-room">🍳 KITCHEN</div>
          <div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);font-size:8px;margin-top:2px">${FL_LABELS[d.floor].toUpperCase()}</div>
          <div style="display:inline-block;margin-top:4px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.25);border-radius:4px;padding:2px 7px;font-size:9px;font-weight:900;color:${d.side==="NORTH"?"#7DD3FC":"#FED7AA"}">${d.side==="NORTH"?"↑ NORTH":"↓ SOUTH"}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="lp-unit">${unit}<div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);font-size:6px">UNIT</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="lp-body">
        <div class="lp-code">${kcBox.id}</div>
        <div class="lp-grid">
          <div class="lp-cell"><div class="lp-cl">FLOOR</div><div class="lp-cv">${d.floor}</div></div>
          <div class="lp-cell" style="background:${d.side==="NORTH"?"#E0F2FE":"#FFF7ED"}"><div class="lp-cl">SIDE</div><div class="lp-cv" style="color:${sclr};font-size:11px">${d.side==="NORTH"?"↑N":"↓S"}</div></div>
          <div class="lp-cell" style="background:${color}18"><div class="lp-cl">BOX</div><div class="lp-cv" style="color:${color};font-size:11px">1/${d.boxCounts.KC}</div></div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:flex-end"><div style="color:#CBD5E1;font-size:7px;text-align:right;line-height:1.4">⚠ LABEL EVERY PIECE<br>INSIDE THIS BOX</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="lp-foot" style="background:${color}"></div>
    </div>`:'';

  document.getElementById('sheet-body').innerHTML=`
    <div class="sheet-header">
      <div class="sheet-badge" style="background:${color};box-shadow:0 4px 16px ${color}66">${unit}</div>
      <div>
        <div class="sheet-unit">Unit ${unit}</div>
        <div class="sheet-sub" style="color:${color}">${FL_LABELS[d.floor]} · ${TYPE_LABELS[d.type]||d.type} · ${totalBoxes} boxes</div>
        <div class="side-pill" style="color:${sclr};background:${sbg};border-color:${sbdr}">${d.side==="NORTH"?"↑ NORTH":"↓ SOUTH"}</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="editor-card">
      <div class="editor-title">✏️ AJUSTE DE CAIXAS</div>
      <div class="ed-grid">${edItems}</div>
      <button class="ed-confirm" style="background:${color};color:#fff" id="confirm-btn-${unit}" onclick="applyBoxChanges('${unit}','${color}')">
        ✅ Confirmar — ${totalBoxes} caixas
      </button>
    </div>

    <div class="status-section">
      <div style="color:#475569;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:8px">STATUS POR MATERIAL</div>
      ${statusSections}
    </div>

    ${labelPreview}
    <button class="sheet-close" onclick="closeSheet()">✕ Fechar</button>
  `;

  document.getElementById('unit-sheet').style.borderColor=color;
  document.getElementById('sheet-overlay').classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('unit-sheet').classList.add('open');

  // Highlight current status buttons
  Object.keys(MATS).forEach(mat=>{
    const matBoxes=d.boxes.filter(b=>b.mat===mat);
    if(matBoxes.length===0)return;
    const allSame=matBoxes.every(b=>b.status===matBoxes[0].status)?matBoxes[0].status:'';
    if(allSame){
      const btn=document.getElementById(`gsb-${unit}-${mat}-${allSame.replace(' ','')}`);
      if(btn){btn.style.background=SC[allSame];btn.style.color='#fff';}
    }
  });
}

function closeSheet(){
  document.getElementById('sheet-overlay').classList.remove('active');
  document.getElementById('unit-sheet').classList.remove('open');
}

function adjustBox(unit,mat,delta){
  const d=state[unit];
  const cur=d.boxCounts[mat]||0;
  const nv=Math.max(0,Math.min(30,cur+delta));
  d.boxCounts[mat]=nv;
  const el=document.getElementById(`bc-${unit}-${mat}`);
  if(el)el.textContent=nv;
  const total=Object.values(d.boxCounts).reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0);
  const btn=document.getElementById(`confirm-btn-${unit}`);
  if(btn)btn.textContent=`✅ Confirmar — ${total} caixas`;
}

function applyBoxChanges(unit,color){
  const d=state[unit];
  const boxes=[];
  Object.entries(MATS).forEach(([mat])=>{
    const total=d.boxCounts[mat]||0;
    for(let b=1;b<=total;b++) boxes.push({
      id:`FM-FL${d.floor}-${unit}-${d.side[0]}-${mat}-BOX${b}of${total}`,
      mat,boxNum:b,totalBoxes:total,status:"ORDERED"
    });
  });
  d.boxes=boxes;
  updateStats();renderGrid();
  // Show feedback
  const btn=document.getElementById(`confirm-btn-${unit}`);
  if(btn){btn.textContent='✅ Salvo!';btn.style.background='#16A34A';setTimeout(()=>{btn.textContent=`✅ Confirmar — ${Object.values(d.boxCounts).reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)} caixas`;btn.style.background=color;},1500);}
}

function setGroupStatus(unit,mat,newStatus){
  const d=state[unit];
  d.boxes.filter(b=>b.mat===mat).forEach(b=>b.status=newStatus);
  // Update button highlights
  Object.keys(MATS).forEach(m=>{
    STATUS_LIST.forEach(s=>{
      const btn=document.getElementById(`gsb-${unit}-${m}-${s.replace(' ','')}`);
      if(btn){btn.style.background=SB[s];btn.style.color=SC[s];}
    });
  });
  const btn=document.getElementById(`gsb-${unit}-${mat}-${newStatus.replace(' ','')}`);
  if(btn){btn.style.background=SC[newStatus];btn.style.color='#fff';}
  updateStats();renderGrid();
}

// ── MAP ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
let currentMapFloor='2';

function buildCurrentFloorMarkers(){
  const fl=currentMapFloor;
  const color=FL_COLORS[parseInt(fl)];
  const maps=document.querySelectorAll(`#map-sec-${fl} .map-container`);
  maps.forEach(mc=>{
    if(markersBuilt[mc.id])return;
    markersBuilt[mc.id]=true;
    const mapId=mc.id.replace('mc-','');
    Object.entries(MARKERS).forEach(([unit,pos])=>{
      if(UNIT_IMG[unit]!==mapId)return;
      const d=state[unit];if(!d)return;
      const m=document.createElement('div');
      m.className='umarker';
      m.style.left=pos[0]+'%';m.style.top=pos[1]+'%';
      m.innerHTML=`<div class="mdot" style="background:${color}">${unit.slice(-2)}</div><div class="mlbl">${unit}</div>`;
      m.onclick=()=>openSheet(unit);
      mc.appendChild(m);
    });
  });
}

function showFloor(fl,btn){
  currentMapFloor=fl;
  [2,3,4,5].forEach(f=>{document.getElementById('map-sec-'+f).style.display=f==fl?'block':'none';});
  document.querySelectorAll('.ftab').forEach(b=>{b.classList.remove('active');b.style.background='#0F172A';b.style.color='#475569';});
  btn.classList.add('active');btn.style.background=FL_COLORS[parseInt(fl)];btn.style.color='#fff';
  buildCurrentFloorMarkers();
}

// ── INIT ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
updateStats();renderFloorFilters();renderGrid();
buildCurrentFloorMarkers(); // pre-build floor 2
</script>

</body></html>
